description:
`src/pending_sync_legacy.rs:19` reads `store.local_dir().join("pending-sync")` to warn (once per process) about staged sync reports left behind by pre-bl-6969 binaries. Called unconditionally from `Store::discover` (`src/store.rs:80`), so every `bl` invocation incurs the check.

The warning's path target is broken under XDG: it points at the Phase 1A catch-all bucket `state/<nested>/pending-sync/`, which bl never wrote to. The only place a legitimate `pending-sync/` could exist is a pre-XDG clone's `<repo>/.balls/local/pending-sync/`.

## Decision

bl-6969 landed 2026-05-25; the deferral window is short, and the warning today fires for nobody (no clone has the catch-all path populated). Per AGENTS.md "Config knobs earn their keep" and "Footprint: demarcation over removal," the right move is to sunset the dedicated module and re-home the diagnostic in `bl doctor`, where stale-artifact findings already live.

## Scope

1. Add `check_legacy_pending_sync` in `src/doctor.rs` that probes `<repo>/.balls/local/pending-sync/` (legacy path, not the XDG catch-all) and emits a finding listing the file count + the directory path. Recommend manual cleanup.
2. Delete `src/pending_sync_legacy.rs` and `src/pending_sync_legacy_tests.rs`.
3. Delete the `crate::pending_sync_legacy::warn_if_present(&store)` call in `Store::discover` (`src/store.rs:80`). `Store::discover` becomes free of legacy-warning side effects, which matches its name.

## Out of scope

- Deletion of `Store::local_dir()` — parent (bl-a11d).
- Auto-cleanup of legacy `pending-sync/` directories. `bl doctor` is read-only by policy; remediation is operator-driven.
title: Sunset pending_sync_legacy::warn_if_present (move diagnostic into bl doctor)
